instruction: Classify the insurance claim description into its claim type.
baseline_prompt: You are an insurance claims router. Classify the insurance claim description into its claim type. Classify into one of these categories: auto_collision, property_fire, water_damage, theft, liability, medical.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: A deer jumped out in front of my vehicle on a rural road and I couldn't stop in time. The animal went over the hood causing damage to the windshield, hood, and roof. There are also dents on the front bumper from the initial impact.

Reporting destruction of our warehouse facility where a faulty generator sparked and ignited nearby cardboard storage. The rapid spread consumed approximately 40% of the building before being controlled, with smoke damage affecting the remainder.
Our air conditioning unit's condensation drain line got clogged and overflowed. The water damaged our hallway ceiling and walls, and we can see mold starting to form in the affected areas.
Woke up to discover that someone entered our garage overnight and made off with power tools, a lawnmower, and other equipment worth several thousand dollars.

I was giving sailing lessons and a student fell overboard due to my improper instruction, resulting in a shoulder injury. They are claiming negligence and seeking coverage for their medical treatment.
Hospital charges for three-day admission, surgical procedure to repair torn ligaments, anesthesia, and post-operative care following an on-premises incident.

My teenage son was driving my car when he misjudged the distance while parallel parking and hit the vehicle in front of him. There's damage to our front bumper and license plate area, though it appears mostly cosmetic.

A cigarette that wasn't properly extinguished caused our deck to catch flame, which then spread to the exterior siding of our house. The back wall is charred and multiple windows cracked from the heat.
The hot water heater in our utility closet ruptured and leaked for hours before we noticed. There's extensive damage to the flooring, and the water has seeped into the walls of our dining room.
Discovered that our construction site was broken into and multiple items are missing including copper wire, power tools, and building materials totaling around $5,000.

A tree from my property fell onto my neighbor's garage during a storm, completely crushing their vehicle that was parked inside. They are asking me to cover the damage to both structures and their car.
Requesting coverage for prescription medications, diagnostic imaging, and specialist consultations following a sports-related knee injury that occurred during a company-sponsored event.

While driving through a parking garage, I scraped the concrete pillar while turning a tight corner. There's a long scrape down the passenger side of my vehicle affecting both doors and I need to file a claim for the repairs.

A lightning strike hit our garage during last week's storm and ignited the structure. Half of the building burned down before firefighters arrived. Tools, stored items, and the entire roof are destroyed.
We returned from vacation to discover our dishwasher had malfunctioned and leaked across our entire kitchen. The cabinets are warped, and we can see moisture damage spreading to the adjacent rooms.

test.query: Someone broke into my car last night while it was parked on the street and took my laptop, GPS device, and about $200 in cash from the center console. The driver's side window was smashed.
While hosting a dinner party, my chandelier fell from the ceiling and injured one of my guests, causing a head laceration requiring surgery. The guest is pursuing compensation for their injuries.
Submitted bills for ambulance transport, ER visit, CT scan, and follow-up appointments related to head trauma sustained during a fall at a retail store.

I was stopped at a red light when the vehicle behind me failed to brake and rear-ended my car. The trunk won't close properly now, the rear bumper is cracked, and the taillights on both sides are broken.

Reporting damage from yesterday's incident where my living room curtains caught flame from a nearby candle. The blaze spread to the wall behind the couch before we could extinguish it. There's soot covering everything and the drywall is charred.

We woke up this morning to find our ceiling dripping in the master bedroom. Apparently the toilet in the upstairs bathroom has been leaking overnight, and now there's significant damage to the ceiling and walls below.
I was mugged while walking home last evening. The individual threatened me and took my phone, watch, and wallet before running away.
A customer slipped and fell on the wet floor in my retail store yesterday, injuring their back. They are now seeking compensation for their medical bills and lost wages from the incident.
Documentation includes costs for urgent care visit, splinting, pain medication, and orthopedic follow-up for suspected fracture in wrist sustained during a slip and fall.

I rear-ended the car in front of me when they suddenly braked for a pedestrian. My front end sustained damage including a cracked bumper, broken grille, and the radiator may be punctured as fluid is leaking underneath.

Need to file a claim for my rental property where tenants left the oven on overnight. It overheated and started a blaze that consumed the kitchen and damaged adjacent rooms with heat and smoke residue.

Our washing machine hose disconnected during a cycle and flooded our laundry room. The water seeped into the adjacent hallway and living room, saturating the carpet and causing the laminate flooring to buckle.
My bicycle was locked to the rack outside my apartment building, but when I came out this morning the lock had been cut and the bike was gone.
My teenage daughter was texting while driving and rear-ended a motorcyclist at a stoplight. The rider sustained serious injuries and is suing for medical costs, bike repairs, and emotional distress.
Bills submitted for emergency room evaluation, sutures for deep laceration on arm, tetanus shot, and infection prevention care after incident with broken glass.

I was making a left turn at an intersection when an oncoming vehicle, which I thought was slowing down, continued through and crashed into my front end. The entire front of my car is damaged and the engine won't start.

Our restaurant's kitchen caught flame when the exhaust hood accumulated grease ignited during dinner service. The suppression system activated, but we have significant heat damage to equipment and smoke throughout the dining area.

Our basement is completely flooded after the heavy rainstorm last night. There's about three inches of standing water covering the entire floor, and our carpets and furniture are soaked through. We need immediate assistance.
My package containing a new tablet was delivered to my porch according to tracking, but it disappeared before I got home from work. Security camera shows someone taking it.

My contractor accidentally damaged the neighboring property's foundation while working on my home renovation project. The neighbor is demanding I pay for structural repairs and engineering assessments.
Patient underwent emergency surgery following a workplace accident that resulted in a fractured femur and severe lacerations requiring 23 stitches and overnight hospitalization.

While backing out of a parking space at the grocery store, I didn't see a pickup truck passing behind me and hit their rear bumper. There are scratches and dents on my rear hatch and their vehicle sustained minor damage as well.

Filing for damages after a space heater malfunction ignited bedding in our master bedroom. The resulting blaze scorched the walls, melted fixtures, and left heavy smoke residue throughout the upper level of our home.

The bathtub in our second-floor bathroom overflowed while our teenager was running a bath and got distracted. Water came pouring through the ceiling into our kitchen below, damaging our cabinets and countertops.
